narrative:
Miamisburg 4-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 749 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
